cases.name: refusal-ground-altered
cases.note: the verbatim ground reworded; the proof no longer matches the canonical content

cases.name: event-payload-altered-resigned
cases.note: digest re-signed by the trusted key; the per-event hash still refuses

cases.name: forbidden-event-injected-resigned
cases.note: every hash and signature valid; the absence proof alone catches the injected transition

cases.name: probe-dropped-resigned
cases.note: an attack vanished from the record; the summary recount refuses

cases.name: seed-stripped-resigned
cases.note: a v0.2 digest requires run.seed — refused before any cryptography

cases.name: seed-uppercase-resigned
cases.note: one canonical spelling per seed: 64 lowercase hex

cases.name: v01-label-smuggling-resigned
cases.note: published versions are never mutated — a v0.1 digest must not carry a seed

cases.name: seed-flipped-resigned
cases.note: trusted re-sign over a different seed; only the derivation checks refuse a canned ledger

cases.name: derivation-mismatch-resigned
cases.note: aggregate id swapped and fully re-signed; the ledger does not use the seed's derived identifier

cases.name: ordering-violated-resigned
cases.note: independent staging blocks swapped against the seed's order; every event hash stays valid
